The '''winter wars''' were a conflict on the primitive [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Rodis]]<ref name="Databank" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Rodis system/Legends|Rodis system]]</ref> The [[Rodisar]] [[Nilo (Rodisar)|Nilo]] was a [[General/Legends|general]] during the winter wars, having risen to that [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] by bribing [[Politics/Legends|politicians]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was lackluster as a [[Commanding officer/Legends|commander]], with his staff providing any military experience.<ref name="Databank" /> Prior to his [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Nilo was kidnapped by [[Zygerrian/Legends|Zygerrian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]], who killed most of his followers when they tried to save him. The Zygerrians sold Nilo to [[Rattataki/Legends|Rattataki]] war [[Baron/Legends|barons]] by talking up his military exploits.<ref name="Databank" />

==Behind the scenes==
The winter wars were mentioned in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry for Nilo published on [[StarWars.com]]<ref name="Databank" /> around the time of the character's appearance in the [[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|sixth chapter]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' microseries,<ref name="CW">{{CW|6}}</ref> which premiered on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[November 15]], [[2003]].<ref name="Airdate">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/archive.html|text=View ''Clone Wars'' Chapter Archive}}</ref>
